Interface IClipFunctionArguments2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control raster clipping function arguments.

[Guid("79B3DEB7-E147-4233-B3C2-5C69AA3555CD")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IClipFunctionArguments2 : IClipFunctionArguments

Properties

IGeometry ClippingGeometry { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

ClippingRaster

The clipping raster object.

object ClippingRaster { get; set; }

Property Value

object
